article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.9. CA - Eileen Dailly Pool AHU1 Replacement 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $813,540 contract to replace aging air handling unit at Eileen Dailly Pool
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a contract worth $813,540 (including taxes) to Fortius Mechanical Inc. to replace a worn-out ventilation unit at the Eileen Dailly Leisure Pool & Fitness Centre. The unit, which controls airflow in the lobby and fitness areas, has reached the end of its useful life and needs replacing to keep the facility running safely.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision on January 27, 2026 — this affects facility operations at Eileen Dailly Pool.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — Eileen Dailly Pool AHU1 contract award
